description: Subscription state + change-deadline rules. The monthly flavor lineup MUST be read from this file (to prevent past mis-guidance).

subscription.new_signup_status: 新規受付 停止中（2026-06-12 時点・再開時期未定）

monthly_contents.2026-06: UNKNOWN（要確認：Lemon Zest, Mango が期間限定で選択可）

change_rules.recurrence: For the following month, customer must contact us again.

cancel_rules.procedure: Cancellation is completed by this message (no further customer action required) — must be stated explicitly.
cancel_rules.flow: State completion → thank them → ask reason (optional, mark as such) → single-purchase re-entry path (TPL-003).
cancel_rules.caution: Past incident: missed cancellation ⇒ next-month billing. Require double-confirmation of cancellation.

auto_cancel.recovery: Re-subscribe from product page (first delivery within ~5 days).
auto_cancel.escalation: First verify the cancellation was NOT in-house (operator handles).

rules: Do not answer 'this month's flavors' from memory. If the master is UNKNOWN, escalate.
For a discontinued flavor request, always propose an alternative (operator instruction).
Do not over-explain subscription details unless asked (operator instruction).
